case_title: EDUCAP, INC. VS. GREGORY ANDERSON et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $264.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GREGORY
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF ROBERT A. HARTLEY, IN SUPPORT OF CALCULATION OF ACCRUED INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC.
DECLARATION OF ROBERT A. HARTLEY, PURSUANT TO CCP 1033 FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC.
DECLARATION OF ROBERT A. HARTLEY, RE: COPIES IN LIEU OF ORIGINALS IN OBTAINING DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT AND DECLARATION RE VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GREGORY DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-08-2013
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, COURT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GREGORY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC. SERVED JAN-16-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GREGORY
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF TESTIMONY IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMNET [CCP 585(A)] FILED BY PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EDUCAP, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON, GREGORY $1,619.79 PRINCIPAL, $425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $584.15 INTEREST, $264.00 COSTS, $385.17 LATE FEE, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,278.11, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
